---
name: Report a Mistake
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[FIX]"
labels: ''
assignees: studycourts

---

**Describe the Mistake**
A clear and concise description of what the mistake is.

**Locate the Error**
Provide the URL and section where the mistake can be found.

**Suggested Correction**
A clear and concise description of what you would expect to see here instead.

**Resources**
If applicable, provide any links or citations to sources that would be helpful as we correct the mistake.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
